scenarios.description: Simple low-risk requests still resolve in a single direct-answer step.
Denied action is replaced with a materially different safe action.
External failures converge to a fallback explanation instead of a silent drop.
Memory recall is injected into planner prompt context.
Per-request scratchpad is injected into prompt context and destroyed after terminal answer.
Unavailable actions are rejected and flow recovers to an answer.
Plan decision decomposes into step continuations that execute through the normal Ego loop.
Low-risk search-first requests still converge into a single final answer after observation.
Id impulse lifecycle finalizes only after all parallel branches complete and accepts when any branch executes valid work.
Assignment-origin async action blocks, resumes through the generic async provider path, and completes deterministically.
LLM-generated cron expression for daily-at-time assignment flows through staging with correct schedule.
Invalid LLM-generated cron fails at AssignmentRuntime, triggers feedback loop, and planner re-plans via general branch.
Assignment creation confirmation (operational, NOT_REQUIRED grounding) passes grounding gate without denial.
Volatile-fact question is denied without evidence, then allowed after web search gathers evidence.
Technical evidence failure triggers retry rather than hard denial; second attempt succeeds.
